headline: Networking now 30% of HPE revenue but over half of profits
summary: There’s a line buried in HPE’s latest earnings commentary that tells you everything about where this company is headed. An HPE executive put it plainly: “Networking, which now represents 30% of our revenue and more than half of our profits.” That single sentence is the thesis.
